error_signature: Invalid JSON input due to carriage return
title: Invalid JSON input for Microsoft Graph API due to carriage return
symptom: When attempting to send a message using the Microsoft Graph API, an error occurs if the input data contains a carriage return character ('\r'). Removing or modifying this character resolves the issue.
applies_when: Input data contains a carriage return
not_this_if: Input data is free of carriage return characters
root_cause: The presence of a carriage return character ('\r') in the JSON input can cause parsing errors when sending requests to the Microsoft Graph API. This character may not be handled correctly by the API, leading to failures in processing the request.
fix_steps: Inspect the JSON input for any carriage return characters ('\r')
Remove the carriage return or replace it with two backslashes ('\\')
Retry sending the request to the Microsoft Graph API
agent_instruction: Remove any carriage return characters from the JSON input before sending the request.
